name: session_manager
description: Manages work sessions with unique IDs, tracks file changes, agent and tool usage, and enables session continuity. Each session gets a dedicated workspace sub-directory under workspace/. Use this to create a session at the start of complex multi-step tasks and close it at the end to produce a structured summary for future reference.

session_id.description: Session identifier in YYYYMMDD_HHmmss format. Required for all actions except 'create', 'list', and 'active'.

description.description: Human-readable description of the session or action being performed. Required for 'create'.

data.description: Action-specific payload. For 'log_change': {file, action, summary, diff_preview?}. For 'log_agent': {agent_id}. For 'log_tool': {tool_name}. For 'add_note': {note}. For 'close': {summary}. For 'create': {description, tags?}.

action.description: Change type: created, modified, deleted, renamed (for log_change).

summary.description: Brief description of the change or close summary.

diff_preview.description: Optional short diff snippet (truncated to 500 chars).

agent_id.description: Agent ID to record as used (for log_agent), e.g. OVR_COD_03.

tool_name.description: Tool name to record as used (for log_tool).

tags.description: Optional tags for categorising the session (for create).

status_filter.description: Filter sessions by status when using 'list'. Options: active, closed.
